title: Bitter Glassy Pilaf
description: A flavorful and colorful pilaf dish showcasing the unique texture of glassy ingredient, complemented by the bitterness of the bitter ingredient.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped bitter and glassy, sauté until tender.
Add khao, khua, and pilaf. Stir well.
Add 2 tbsp of water, cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in jelly and cook for 2 minutes.
Turn off heat, let it rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve.
